description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details A copper brown wallet with a brass colour buckle and synthetic tie up detail on the side Synthetic and velvet overlay in the front A shiny finish One main compartment with a zipper internal pocket on one side and open pouches on the other One zipped compartment in the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Dimensions 10 cm x 30 cm
